content: Rendering polish after browser review: shared parallel edge lanes now use a 9px offset instead of the previous 6px spacing, so intentionally parallel lines remain readable without reverting to overlap. Endpoint protection now scales with lane spacing to preserve perpendicular source/target stubs, and a buildEdgePaths regression asserts shared lanes keep at least 9px separation. Verification: npm test -- --run test/edges.test.ts test/render.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm test, npm run build. Existing untracked reports/ left untouched.
